chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Criminal Misc. Application No.786 of 2025 Applicant: Nadeem Ahmed s/o Aqeel Ahmed through Mr. Manzoor Hussain Soomro, Advocate v. Respondent: The State Date of Hearing: 08.09.2025 Date of Decision: 18.09.2025 O R D E R Jawad Akbar Sarwana, J.: The applicant/accused, Nadeem Ahmed has filed, in the first instance, this cr. misc. application seeking quashment of proceedings in FIR No.12/2025 under Sections 406, 109 PPC registered at FIA (CCC) Karachi. Applicant/accused has filed applications before the trial court under neither Sections 249-A Cr.P.C. nor 265-K Cr.P.C., and instead filed this application under Section 561-A Cr.P.C. for quashment of proceedings. Therefore, I reserved the case maintainability. 2. Applicant/accused contends that he had filed civil suit no.761/2020 against the complainant of the FIR, Wajid Naseem, who, as a counterblast, got the above-mentioned FIR registered against the applicant/accused for an alleged criminal offence, which apparently occurred in 2019-2020. The applicant/accused contends that the ingredients of Section 406 Cr.P.C. are also not made out. 3. Heard Counsel and perused the record available on file as alleged by the applicant/accused and reported Judgment of the Supreme Court of Pakistan reported in Ayesha Tayyab v. SHO, Police Station Cantt. District Sialkot and Others, 2025 SCMR Crl. Misc. Appln No.786 of 2025 -2- Page 2 of 2 1117, I find the above titled Cr. Misc. Appln. to be maintainable. 4. Issue Notice to the Respondents, DAG and APG for next week to come up for hearing according to Roster. J U D G E
